title: hydrocotyle humifusa
intro: Hydrocotyle humifusa, also known as creeping water penny or marsh pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocotylaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle humifusa include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. Hydrocotyle humifusa can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
